content:
| ::EDU_SYLLABUS_X | Modular education builder: core logic, method, and application layers. |
| ::TRANSLAT10N_ENGINE | Recursive language processors: multilingual logic, wordcutting, narrative transformation. |
| ::FLOAT1NG_VIS | Visual + motion syntax: video systems, projection mapping, gallery forms. |
| ::DR34M_AI | AI x Ritual integration: symbolic dream tools, machine-mediated spirituality. |

Each of these is tagged by:
- Primary Logic Mode
- Domain/Medium
- System Role (Tool, Archive, Ritual, Study, etc.)
- Link to Parent Node (e.g., ::4_bl00m or ::AJP.MECA.ARTS)

---

### OUTPUT STRUCTURE PER THREAD

Each thread generates:
- `.md` file for GitHub
- `.txt` version for iPhone Notes
- Optional PDF format (with diagram, metadata, glyph)
